hero-title:
Elegance in every step.
Sustainability in every detail.
hero-subtitle: Since 1997, raising the global standard for luxury women's footwear.
about-p1: Founded on May 16, 1997, Lótus Calçados is synonymous with sophistication and incomparable quality. We produce more than 400 daily pairs of high-value women's footwear, operating 100% on a private label model for the most demanding international brands.
about-p2: Our market is entirely focused abroad, mainly supplying the United States and Europe through partner brands that, like us, have sustainability as a fundamental pillar.
cta-subtitle: We are premium private label manufacturing partners for the world's leading brands. Let's create something extraordinary together.
social-card1-p: Our 130 employees are our greatest strength. We offer medical and dental plans, and attendance-based food kits. Our factory is 100% air-conditioned and extremely clean, ensuring absolute thermal comfort during all four seasons of the year.
social-card2-p: Proudly located in Sapiranga, Lótus actively sponsors social events and encourages internal volunteering. We are strong supporters of APAE and the League for Combating Cancer, creating real and valuable ties in our land.
sus-subtitle: Environmental sustainability combined with technological efficiency
sus-card1-p: 800 photovoltaic panels supply 90% of our demand. On the way to 100%, we reduced the current bill by 80%. Return on investment in just 5 years.
sus-card2-p: We recycle 100% of our more than 2 monthly tons of paper, plastic, and metal. Production residues are transformed into co-products for construction.
sus-card3-p: We modernize our machinery by investing in clean technologies, saving an impressive 2 tons of steel every month during our manufacturing process.
info-loc-val: 90 Sen. Alberto Pasqualini Ave – Sapiranga Centro – RS – Brazil

meta-description: Premium women's footwear manufacturer and private label partner. Over 400 pairs daily for leading international brands since 1997.
